endpoints.name: Update the following status of the logged-in user for a particular aggregation
endpoints.description: After a successful call, this returns a User document with an updated list of affiliations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NPR_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NPR ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Update the logged-in user's favorite station(s)
endpoints.description: Right now, only the primary station can be changed. Previously selected stations will not be deleted, but the new station will be moved to first in the array.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NPR_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NPR ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Get the latest state information about the logged-in user
endpoints.description: After a successful login, the client should send a `GET` call approximately once an hour to refresh the user data.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NPR_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NPR ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Delete the user's account
endpoints.description: Use with caution as some steps are irreverisble. Initiates the user account deletion process, including removal of all user PII and account access.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NPR_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NPR ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: Copy listening data from a temporary user account to the logged-in user's account
endpoints.description:
This can and should only be used by clients who have access to the `temporary_user` grant type.
    Third-party developers do not have access to this grant type by default, and will not need this endpoint.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{NPR_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your NPR ACCESS TOKEN.
